summary: At Alephoo, Gabriel works as a Full Stack Developer, contributing to the development and maintenance of various web applications. His role involves a mix of backend and frontend tasks, API development, and database management in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Developing and maintaining web applications using PHP (CodeIgniter 3), JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.
Designing, implementing, and consuming REST APIs.
Building high-performance backend services with Go (Golang).
Managing and designing databases using MySQL and MariaDB.
Analyzing requirements to implement new features and improvements.
Utilizing Git for version control with GitHub and GitLab.
Handling production deployments, support, and bug fixing.

summary: As the founder of MoonPixel, Gabriel offers freelance software development services. He manages the full project lifecycle, delivering custom web solutions for clients by leveraging his expertise in modern technologies.
responsibilities: End-to-end full stack development of web applications.
Client communication for requirements gathering and feedback.
Architecting frontend and backend solutions using technologies like Angular, Node.js, and PHP.
Configuring and managing hosting environments, including VPS, domains, and DNS.
Implementing and integrating third-party REST APIs.
Performing deployments and providing ongoing maintenance and support.
